name: 暗影双匕（★） | 森林 DDPAT
nameZh: 暗影双匕（★） | 森林 DDPAT
descriptionEn: Designed for efficient brutality, using a push dagger is as simple as throwing a punch or two. It has been painted using a Digital Disruptive Pattern (DDPAT) hydrographic. By the time you're close enough to notice the pixels it's already too late
descriptionZh: 专为高效行凶设计，手推短匕用起来就和挥一两记重拳一样简单。 这把武器使用数字迷彩（DDPAT）图案的花纹进行了涂装。 当你能注意到像素图案的时候，已经为时已晚了
